name: watchog
flavor_texts: When they see an enemy, their tails stand high, and they spit the seeds of berries stored in their cheek pouches.
They make the patterns on their bodies shine in order to threaten predators. Keen eyesight lets them see in the dark.
Using luminescent matter, it makes its eyes and body glow and stuns attacking opponents.
text: Watchog is the Lookout Pokémon. It is a normal-type Pokémon. Abilities: illuminate, keen-eye, analytic (hidden). Base stats — HP: 60, Attack: 85, Defense: 69, Sp. Atk: 60, Sp. Def: 69, Speed: 77. Evolution line: patrat → watchog. Lore: When they see an enemy, their tails stand high, and they spit the seeds of berries stored in their cheek pouches. They make the patterns on their bodies shine in order to threaten predators. Keen eyesight lets them see in the dark. Using luminescent matter, it makes its eyes and body glow and stuns attacking opponents.
